title: Rapid account takeover via credential stuffing
description: Attacker used leaked credential pairs from a third-party breach to log in and immediately initiate high-value transfers to mule accounts. Login came from a new device and country. Transfers were rapid succession within 5 minutes.
resolution: Block transaction, force re-authentication, notify user via secondary channel, flag all pending transfers

title: Social engineering - impersonation of bank support
description: Customer called by fraudster posing as bank support. Customer was convinced to approve a 'security test' transaction. Normal device, normal location but payee was newly created account.
resolution: Delay transaction 24h for large amounts to newly registered payees, send OTP confirmation via registered phone

title: Card testing attack - low value probing
description: Multiple small transactions (< ₹10) made to different merchants in quick succession from the same card. Classic card testing before large purchase.
resolution: Block card, require OTP for next 5 transactions, alert user, flag merchant pattern

title: Mule account pattern - multiple inbound transfers
description: Account received 15 small transfers from 15 different accounts within 2 hours, then one large outbound transfer. Classic money mule aggregation pattern.
resolution: Hold outbound transfer, SAR filing required, notify compliance team, freeze account pending review

title: SIM swap fraud - mobile banking takeover
description: Customer's phone number was ported to fraudster's SIM. OTPs were intercepted. Transactions approved from new device with valid OTP. Preceded by account detail change (address update).
resolution: Add device binding verification, flag SIM change events, delay transactions for 24h after SIM swap

title: Legitimate international wire transfer - false positive
description: Customer who works remotely initiated a legitimate international transfer to pay overseas contractor. New payee, international destination, mid-range amount. Customer had history of domestic-only transactions.
resolution: Allow with additional OTP verification. Do not block - these false positives damage customer trust

title: Salary advance - large unusual transfer
description: HR department processed salary advance for employee due to emergency. Large transfer, unusual day (not salary date), new internal account. Company KYC verified.
resolution: Allow - corporate accounts with verified KYC should have higher thresholds

title: Device sharing - family account confusion
description: Multiple family members using shared device. Different user accounts logged in from same device fingerprint. Appears as device anomaly but is benign.
resolution: Allow - implement device fingerprint sharing awareness, use account-device binding differently

title: Authorised push payment scam - romance fraud
description: Elderly customer was convinced over 3 months to transfer savings to fraudster posing as online romantic partner. 12 transfers, each under ₹50,000, spread over weeks to avoid detection.
resolution: Detect gradual escalation pattern, trigger enhanced due diligence for elderly customers with new payees, consider APP scam alerts

title: Merchant fraud - fake invoice payment
description: Business account received fraudulent invoice via email (BEC attack). Finance team paid ₹8,50,000 to fraudster's account. Domain name was similar to real vendor.
resolution: Implement account name verification (CoP), flag account name mismatches, require callback verification for amounts > ₹5L

title: ATM jackpotting - coordinated cash-out
description: Attacker with physical ATM access installed malware. Multiple mule accounts made maximum withdrawals at 3 AM across multiple ATMs simultaneously.
resolution: Block all withdrawals, notify security team immediately, disable affected ATMs, file incident report

title: Employee collusion - insider threat
description: Bank employee with privileged access created ghost accounts and diverted small amounts (₹100-500) from dormant accounts over 18 months. Total loss ₹12 lakhs.
resolution: Implement anomaly detection on privileged user actions, periodic dormant account audits, four-eyes principle for dormant account operations

title: Phishing via SMS - UPI credential capture
description: Customer received fake SMS claiming KYC expiry. Clicked link, entered UPI PIN on fake site. Multiple transactions initiated within 2 minutes from attacker's device.
resolution: Add device binding, rate limit new device transactions, educate customers never to enter PIN on links

title: Cryptocurrency exchange fraud
description: Customer transferred funds to cryptocurrency exchange claiming to be a legitimate investment platform. Platform was a scam. Amount was life savings.
resolution: Alert customers when sending to known crypto exchanges, add scam warning page, suggest helpline

title: Gift card scam - tax authority impersonation
description: Victim convinced by fraudster posing as Income Tax officer to pay 'penalty' via gift cards. Multiple small transactions to gift card top-up merchants.
resolution: Show scam warning popup for gift card merchants over ₹10,000, add helpline number to transaction screen

title: Account dormancy exploitation
description: Attacker obtained credentials for a long-dormant account via dark web. Account had not been used for 2 years. Large transfer made immediately after login.
resolution: Mandatory re-KYC for accounts dormant > 1 year before allowing transfers, alert on dormant account activity

title: QR code payment fraud
description: Merchant QR code was replaced with fraudster's QR code. Multiple customers paid but merchant didn't receive money. Unusual spike in payments to unknown account from diverse customers.
resolution: Implement merchant name verification on QR scans, flag sudden spike in new payers to account

title: Advance fee fraud - investment scheme
description: Customer deceived by WhatsApp group claiming high returns on stock tips. Transferred ₹2.5L as 'investment'. Group then demanded more fees before 'releasing profits'.
resolution: Add investment scam warning for large transfers to new overseas accounts, customer education

title: Refund fraud - return merchandise abuse
description: Customer claimed refund for transactions they actually completed. Pattern of initiating chargebacks on legitimate purchases.
resolution: Track chargeback history per customer, flag customers with > 3 chargebacks per quarter for enhanced review

title: Travel - legitimate foreign transaction
description: Customer traveling abroad made hotel and restaurant payments in foreign currency. Previous domestic-only history. Triggered velocity and foreign transaction alerts.
resolution: Allow - customer had set travel notification. Implement travel notification feature to suppress false positives

title: Business payroll processing
description: Company processed bulk payroll - 350 transactions of varying amounts to employee accounts. Triggered bulk transaction alert.
resolution: Allow - corporate accounts with payroll mandate should be excluded from velocity checks

title: Triangulation fraud - marketplace scam
description: Fraudster listed non-existent goods on legitimate marketplace. Used stolen card details to purchase real goods from another seller, shipping to victim. Victim paid fraudster.
resolution: Implement address verification service, flag merchants with first-time shipping to unusual addresses

title: Account opening fraud - synthetic identity
description: Fraudster created account using mix of real and fabricated PII (real PAN, fake address). Passed initial KYC. Used account for money laundering before detection at 90 days.
resolution: Implement holistic identity verification, cross-reference multiple data sources, flag inconsistent PII combinations

title: BNPL abuse - buy now pay later default pattern
description: Customer repeatedly maxed out BNPL credit, made minimum payments, then defaulted. Pattern of opening new BNPL accounts with slight identity variations.
resolution: Monitor BNPL utilization patterns, require enhanced income verification for high-limit BNPL applications

title: Emergency medical payment - legitimate urgent transfer
description: Customer made urgent large transfer to private hospital for emergency surgery. Late night, large amount, new payee. Customer had clean history.
resolution: Allow with OTP verification. Medical emergencies are time-sensitive - balance security with customer experience

title: Pig butchering scam
description: Long-running investment fraud. Fraudster built trust over months via dating app then introduced crypto investment platform. Customer transferred savings incrementally. Platform showed fake profits.
resolution: Alert on escalating transfers to same crypto payee, implement cooling-off period for amounts exceeding historical average by > 5x

title: Deepfake voice CEO fraud
description: AI-generated voice clone of CEO convinced CFO to transfer ₹45L to fraudster. Call appeared to come from CEO's number. CFO bypassed normal approval process.
resolution: Mandate dual approval for transfers > ₹10L regardless of hierarchy, implement call-back verification policy

title: Collateral loan fraud
description: Customer pledged same asset as collateral to multiple lenders simultaneously. Coordinated across banks within narrow time window before credit bureau updated.
resolution: Real-time CERSAI check for collateral registration, cross-bank data sharing for concurrent loan detection

title: Remittance fraud - wire interception
description: Business email compromise led to change of beneficiary bank details in legitimate invoice. Company wired payment to fraudster's account instead of regular supplier.
resolution: Confirmation of Payee for account number + name match, alert on beneficiary detail changes for recurring payees

title: Student - first international tuition fee
description: Student paying university tuition abroad for the first time. Large international transfer, new payee, no prior international history. Parents transferred from family account.
resolution: Allow with OTP. Education payments to known universities should be in an approved list to reduce friction
